function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0008
alias: helios_backfill_rollout_week
issued_on: 2026-02-17
total_eur: 610
counterparty: Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH
project: Helios Workflow Sprint
related_entity: Claudia Reiter
lines:
  - item: checklist rewrite and rollout pack
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 390
    line_eur: 390
  - item: staff follow-up support
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 110
    line_eur: 220
---
# Helios rollout week invoice

```text
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| field          | value                          |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                        |
| invoice_number | INV-0008                       |
| alias          | helios_backfill_rollout_week   |
| issued_on      | 2026-02-17                     |
| total_eur      | 610                            |
| counterparty   | Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH |
| project        | Helios Workflow Sprint         |
| related_entity | Claudia Reiter                 |
+----------------+--------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                               | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | checklist rewrite and rollout pack | 1   | 390      | 390      |
| 2 | staff follow-up support            | 2   | 110      | 220      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                              |     |          | 610      |
+---+------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A later invoice from the point where usable support mattered more than elegant process language.

next_step.current_state: Invoice file updated successfully with schema-aligned frontmatter and preserved body. Next workflow step is to remove processed inbox item; it was read earlier, satisfying read-before-delete rule.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request by OCR-structuring the specified invoice note into YAML frontmatter (required invoice fields plus related_entity and ordered lines), preserved the original body below frontmatter, and deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read/context), read nested AGENTS files on entering folders, used workflow+schema docs before structured edit, preserved existing body under new frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox file requested OCR frontmatter extraction for one invoice. The target invoice file visibly contained all required schema fields and line items; these were mapped into the finance invoice frontmatter shape from the schema doc without inventing fields. After successful write, inbox-processing workflow required deleting the processed inbox file, which was done.
